title: Event Registration & RSVP
description: A premium dark-editorial multi-step event registration form. Fully editable in MegaForm Builder. Side-panel stepper on desktop, stacked stepper on mobile. Warm amber accent, high-contrast dark shell.

fields.label: Attendee Info
fields.heading: Who’s attending?
fields.intro: Enter the details of the primary ticket holder. These will appear on your confirmation email.

fields.label: Ticket
fields.heading: Choose your ticket
fields.intro: Select the pass that best suits you. All ticket types include full access to the evening reception.

fields.label: Additional Guests
fields.hint: How many extra people are you bringing? (Max 4)

fields.label: Logistics
fields.heading: Logistics & accessibility
fields.intro: Help us prepare the best possible experience for you on the day.

fields.label: Accessibility Requirements
fields.placeholder: Wheelchair access, hearing loop, dietary allergies…

fields.label: Confirm
fields.heading: Almost done — confirm your spot
fields.intro: Review your details one last time and let us know about your social presence.

fields.label: How did you hear about this event?

options.label: I agree to receive event updates and communications from the organiser.
I consent to being photographed / filmed at the event for promotional use.

customHtml:
Event Registration

Join the Event

Secure your spot in four quick steps. All ticket types include the evening reception.

  1. 01 Attendee Your details
  2. 02 Ticket Choose your pass
  3. 03 Logistics Meals & access
  4. 04 Confirm Review & submit

Questions? Contact us

  1. 1Attendee
  2. 2Ticket
  3. 3Logistics
  4. 4Confirm
Step 1 of 4

Who’s attending?

Enter the details of the primary ticket holder. These will appear on your confirmation email.

{{field:first_name}}
{{field:last_name}}
{{field:email_address}} {{field:phone_number}}
{{field:job_title}}
{{field:organisation}}
Step 2 of 4

Choose your ticket

Select the pass that best suits you. All ticket types include full access to the evening reception.

{{field:ticket_type}} {{field:additional_guests}} {{field:session_tracks}}
Step 3 of 4

Logistics & accessibility

Help us prepare the best possible experience for you on the day.

{{field:attendance_date}} {{field:meal_preference}} {{field:tshirt_size}} {{field:accessibility_needs}}
Step 4 of 4

Almost done — confirm your spot

Review your details one last time and let us know about your social presence.

{{field:linkedin_url}} {{field:how_did_you_hear}} {{field:experience_rating}} {{field:consent_communications}} {{field:consent_photography}} {{field:utm_source}} {{field:utm_campaign}}
